name: terminal-session-recall
description: Automatically resume Claude Code CLI sessions after VSCode restart

claudeResurrect.autoRestore.description: Automatically restore Claude sessions on VSCode startup

claudeResurrect.autoRestoreMaxAge.description: Maximum age (hours) of sessions to auto-restore

claudeResurrect.claudePath.description: Path to the Claude CLI executable

claudeResurrect.claudeArgs.description: Extra CLI arguments passed to every Claude session (e.g. --model, --verbose)

claudeResurrect.userName.description: System user name for running Claude sessions. Used as terminal name prefix and in shellWrapper {user} placeholder.

claudeResurrect.shellWrapper.description: Shell command template for running Claude as a different user. Placeholders: {cmd} = claude command, {cwd} = working directory, {user} = userName. Only used when userName is set. Leave empty to run commands directly.

claudeResurrect.maxQuickPickSessions.description: Maximum number of resumable/completed sessions shown in the QuickPick menu. Lower values improve QuickPick responsiveness.

claudeResurrect.sessionPresets.description: Pre-configured session templates for one-click launch

sessionId.description: Session ID to resume (--resume). Omit to start a new session

args.description: Extra CLI flags for this preset

terminalName.description: Custom terminal tab name (defaults to label)

autoLaunch.description: Automatically launch this preset on VS Code startup

userName.description: System user to run as. Overrides global userName for this preset

shellWrapper.description: Shell wrapper template. Overrides global shellWrapper for this preset. Placeholders: {cmd}, {cwd}, {user}
